title: satureja imbricata
intro: Satureja imbricata, also known as the Thyme-leaved Sage or Creeping Thyme, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant offers several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues, and protecting against certain infections. Satureja imbricata can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, essential oils, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
